subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Praise be to God that the loved ones of Hamadan are all knowing and steadfast, firm in the Cause of His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی الحمد لله احبای همدان همه دانند و مستقیم و ثابت بر امر حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
